source_pr.title: chunk: refactor test to fix unstable test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Don't use ```t.Run``` to implement the test. it will lead to unstable test.
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: chunk: refactor test to fix unstable test
failure_signature: chunk: refactor test to fix unstable test
root_cause_explanation: The disk spill tests modify global configuration (`config.UpdateGlobal` for `SpilledFileEncryptionMethod`) and rely on proper restoration to avoid affecting other tests. Using `t.Run` subtests under a single parent with shared setup/defers can make the global-config scope unclear and lead to unstable behavior when tests run in different orders/contexts. The patch stabilizes the suite by removing `t.Run` subtests and splitting them into separate top-level test functions, each with its own config update + restore, reducing shared-state interference.
fix_pattern: Isolate global config mutations: split `t.Run` subtests into separate tests, each with its own `config.UpdateGlobal` + `RestoreFunc()`.

evidence: evidence: chunk: refactor test to fix unstable test
